MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF AUBREY BURRIS MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Ilya D. Frangos, Esq. of Galine, Frye & Fitting 650/345-8484 for pltf & moving party; Michael R. Chambers, Esq. of Law Offices of MacMorris & Carbone 510/267-7276 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW GOOD CAUSE AS TO WHY AN EXTENTION OF TIME FOR DISCOVERY SHOULD BE GRANTED. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
